Si l'application semble lente ou affiche: If the application seems slow or displays obsolete data, you can clear the cache from the settings. This forces data to reload from the server.

CuniApp est une plateforme SaaS de gesti: CuniApp is a SaaS platform for professional rabbit farm management. It allows you to track your breeding, manage your herd, issue PDF invoices, and monitor your farm's performance from a single dashboard.

Lors de votre première connexion, vous s: Upon your first login, you will be redirected to your farm's configuration page. Fill in:
Vous pouvez également ajouter un lapin d: You can also add a rabbit directly from the "All Rabbits" section via the "New rabbit" button.
Chaque femelle dispose d'un historique r: Each doe has a complete reproductive history showing her matings, gestations, births, and performance. Access it by clicking on a doe's name.
Un essai gratuit de 14 jours est offert: A 14-day free trial is offered upon registration. No credit card required.
Informations générales : code, nom, sexe: General information: code, name, sex, birth weight.
Voyez qui est actuellement en ligne et l: See who is currently online and the last login of each employee.

Tout ce que vous devez savoir pour gérer: Everything you need to know to effectively manage your rabbit farm with CuniApp.
Changer le statut de paiement (en attent: Change payment status (pending, partially paid, paid).
Chaque lapin, mâle ou femelle doit avoir: Each rabbit, male or female, must have a unique code. During creation, the system automatically checks that the code is not already in use. If the code already exists, an error message is displayed and you must choose another.
Sélectionnez le(s) lapin(s) à vendre dep: Select the rabbit(s) to sell from the dropdown list.
Gérez vos ventes, émettez des factures P: Manage your sales, issue PDF invoices, and track payments.
Lignes de facture avec descriptions et m: Invoice lines with descriptions and amounts.
Enregistrez la vente. Une facture sera g: Register the sale. An invoice will be automatically generated.
Votre abonnement restera actif jusqu'à l: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the paid period.
Cliquez sur \"Renvoyer le code\" pour en: Click "Resend code" to receive a new one.
Avant de supprimer votre compte, assurez: Before deleting your account, make sure you have exported your data if necessary.
Renseignez le prix, le mode de paiement: Fill in the price, payment method, and client information.
Les lapereaux sans vaccin sont affichés: Kits without vaccine are displayed with an "Unvaccinated" badge. A vaccination counter is displayed in the details of each litter.
Si un administrateur vous a attribué un: If an administrator has assigned you a temporary password, you will be forced to change it upon first login. The new password must contain at least 8 characters.

La page \"Mon Abonnement\" affiche l'his: The "My Subscription" page displays the complete history of your payments with status (completed, pending, failed), date, amount, and method used. You can retry a failed payment directly from this page.
Si c'est votre première connexion via Go: If this is your first connection via Google, you will be redirected to a form to complete your registration:

Consulter les détails d'un mâle en cliqu: View details of a male by clicking on his name.
Toutes les saillies, palpations, naissan: All matings, palpations, births with dates and results.
Vous pouvez exporter l'ensemble de vos d: You can export all your data in JSON format from the settings. This feature is useful for backups or migration.
Vous pouvez annuler votre abonnement à t: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the "My Subscription" page. After cancellation:
Exportez la liste de vos ventes au forma: Export your sales list to CSV format for external analysis.
L'employé pourra se connecter immédiatem: The employee will be able to log in immediately with the credentials provided.
En tant qu'administrateur de ferme, vous: As a farm administrator, you can invite collaborators to join your firm. Each employee will have their own account with access to the farm data.

Si vous essayez d'accéder à une fonction: If you try to access a feature requiring an active subscription (herd management, sales, etc.) without a subscription, you will be redirected to a page inviting you to subscribe. This page is also displayed if your subscription has expired.
L'annulation ne rembourse pas la période: Cancellation does not refund the current period. No data will be deleted.
Sélectionnez la femelle et la date de la: Select the doe and the date of kindling.

Vous pouvez gérer les paiements de diffé: You can manage payments in different ways:
Si votre abonnement est actif, vous pouv: If your subscription is active, you can renew it early from the "My Subscription" page. Click "Renew", choose your payment method, and confirm. Your subscription will be extended by the duration of the chosen plan.
Consultez le graphique d'activité de cha: Consult the activity chart of each employee over different periods (7d, 30d, 90d).
Lien vers la mise bas enregistrée si ell: Link to the registered kindling if it has taken place.
Le calendrier du tableau de bord affiche: The dashboard calendar displays important events of your breeding:
Lors de l'enregistrement ou de la modifi: When registering or modifying a birth, you can add vaccines for each kit:
Consultez les activités récentes depuis: Consult recent activities from the dashboard or the dedicated section.
Marquez une notification comme lue en cl: Mark a notification as read by clicking on it.
Vous pouvez quand même consulter votre p: You can still view your profile, settings, and notifications even without an active subscription.
Désactiver temporairement un compte empl: Temporarily deactivate an employee account without deleting it.
Le centre de notifications vous alerte d: The notification center alerts you of important events: palpation reminders, subscription expiration, recent activities.
État de santé et état actuel (vivant, ve: Health status and current state (live, sold, deceased).
Utilisez un format de code cohérent (ex:: Use a consistent code format (e.g. ML-001, FL-001) to facilitate search and identification.
Rendez-vous sur la page d'accueil et cli: Go to the home page and click "Get Started".
Sélectionnez plusieurs ventes et supprim: Select several sales and delete them in a single action.
Naviguez entre les mois avec les flèches: Navigate between months with the arrows to see upcoming or past events.
Le tableau de bord affiche des cartes de: The dashboard displays metric cards at the top of the page with your herd counters and trends:
Femelle, date, nb vivants, morts-nés, to: Doe, date, no. live, stillborn, total.
Vous pouvez supprimer votre compte depui: You can delete your account from the profile page. This action is irreversible: all your data will be permanently deleted after a period of 30 days.
Enregistrez. La saillie apparaîtra dans: Save. The mating will appear in the doe's history.
Filtrez par notifications non lues depui: Filter by unread notifications from the link in the dashboard widget.
